<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jumeau Numérique Industriel — Commande & Supervision Moteur Asynchrone</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #070b10;
  --surface: #0e1520;
  --surface2: #151f2e;
  --accent: #00c8ff;
  --accent2: #ff6b35;
  --accent3: #39e07a;
  --accent4: #c77dff;
  --text: #dde6f0;
  --text-muted: #6b7f96;
  --border: rgba(0,200,255,0.12);
  --font: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  --mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--font);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:.9rem 2rem;background:rgba(7,11,16,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.nav-logo{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.1em;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:1.8rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.04em;transition:color .2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent)}
.hamburger{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;padding:4px}
.hamburger span{width:22px;height:2px;background:var(--accent);display:block;transition:all .3s}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;padding:7rem 2rem 4rem;text-align:center;overflow:hidden}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:
  radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(0,200,255,.08) 0%, transparent 70%),
  radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 80% 80%, rgba(199,125,255,.06) 0%, transparent 60%)}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,200,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,200,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:900px}
.hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.6rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;animation:fadeUp .6s ease both}
.hero-eyebrow-line{width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--accent)}
.hero-eyebrow span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.7rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(1.9rem,5.5vw,4rem);font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:1.5rem;animation:fadeUp .7s .1s ease both}
.hero h1 .accent{color:var(--accent)}
.hero h1 .accent2{color:var(--accent3)}
.hero-sub{font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.8vw,1.1rem);color:var(--text-muted);max-width:650px;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;animation:fadeUp .7s .2s ease both;line-height:1.8}
.hero-authors{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:2rem;animation:fadeUp .7s .25s ease both}
.author-chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;padding:.4rem 1rem;font-size:.82rem}
.author-chip .dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent3)}
.tech-badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem;justify-content:center;animation:fadeUp .7s .3s ease both}
.badge{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;padding:.35rem .85rem;border-radius:3px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted)}
.badge.b1{color:var(--accent);border-color:rgba(0,200,255,.3)}
.badge.b2{color:var(--accent3);border-color:rgba(57,224,122,.3)}
.badge.b3{color:var(--accent2);border-color:rgba(255,107,53,.3)}
.badge.b4{color:var(--accent4);border-color:rgba(199,125,255,.3)}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── SECTION BASE ── */
section{padding:5rem 2rem}
.container{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto}
.section-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.section-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.68rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.12em}
.section-num-line{flex:1;max-width:40px;height:1px;background:var(--accent);opacity:.4}
.section-title{font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2.2rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.section-desc{color:var(--text-muted);max-width:620px;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:3rem;line-height:1.8}
.alt-bg{background:var(--surface)}

/* ── METRICS ── */
.metrics-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:1rem;margin-bottom:3.5rem}
.metric{text-align:center;padding:1.75rem 1rem;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.metric::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),transparent)}
.metric-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.metric-label{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:.04em}

/* ── ARCHITECTURE SVG CARD ── */
.arch-card{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;overflow-x:auto}
.arch-svg-wrap{width:100%;overflow-x:auto}
.arch-svg-wrap svg{width:100%;min-width:600px;height:auto}

/* ── FLOW SCHEMA ── */
.flow-schema{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;overflow-x:auto}
.flow-schema svg{width:100%;min-width:700px;height:auto}

/* ── SPECS GRID ── */
.specs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.25rem}
.spec-card{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:1.6rem;position:relative;transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s}
.spec-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,200,255,.4);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.spec-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:10px;background:radial-gradient(circle at 0% 0%,rgba(0,200,255,.04),transparent 60%);pointer-events:none}
.spec-icon{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.spec-title{font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:.3rem}
.spec-val{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.75rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.6rem}
.spec-desc{font-size:.84rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.65}

/* ── GALLERY ── */
.gallery-section-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--mono);margin:3rem 0 1.25rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem}
.gallery-section-title::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border)}

/* Full-width 2-col gallery */
.gallery-duo{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.gallery-single{margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.gallery-trio{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.25rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem}

.img-card{background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.img-card:hover{border-color:rgba(0,200,255,.35);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.img-card img{width:100%;display:block;object-fit:cover;object-position:top}
.img-card.full img{height:420px}
.img-card.half img{height:320px}
.img-card.third img{height:240px}
.img-caption{padding:1rem 1.25rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.img-caption-title{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.img-caption-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.5}

/* ── LADDER ── */
.code-block{background:#060a0f;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:2rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.8rem;line-height:2;overflow-x:auto}
.code-block .cm{color:#3a5060}
.code-block .kw{color:var(--accent);font-weight:500}
.code-block .vr{color:var(--accent3)}
.code-block .ad{color:var(--accent2)}
.code-block .vl{color:#c9a96e}
.code-block .lb{color:var(--accent4)}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:3rem 2rem;text-align:center}
.footer-title{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.88rem;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.75rem;letter-spacing:.08em}
.footer-meta{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.9}
.footer-contacts{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:2rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.footer-contact{text-align:center}
.footer-contact .name{font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.footer-contact .role{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.footer-contact a{color:var(--accent);font-size:.8rem;font-family:var(--mono);text-decoration:none}

/* ── DIVIDER ── */
hr.div{border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:.9rem 1.2rem}
  .nav-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;background:rgba(7,11,16,.98);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:1.5rem 1.5rem;gap:1.1rem}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex}
  .hamburger{display:flex}
  section{padding:3.5rem 1.25rem}
  .gallery-duo,.gallery-trio{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .img-card.full img,.img-card.half img,.img-card.third img{height:260px}
  .metrics-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#">JUMEAU NUMÉRIQUE INDUSTRIEL</a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <li><a href="#contexte">Contexte</a></li>
    <li><a href="#architecture">Architecture</a></li>
    <li><a href="#methodo">Méthodologie</a></li>
    <li><a href="#programme">Programme</a></li>
    <li><a href="#resultats">Résultats</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="hamburger" id="hbg" onclick="document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow-line"></div>
      <span>EMSI Casablanca · Industrie 4.0</span>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow-line"></div>
    </div>
    <h1>
      Jumeau Numérique Industriel<br>
      d'un Système de <span class="accent">Commande</span> et de<br>
      <span class="accent2">Supervision</span> d'un Moteur Asynchrone
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Développement d'un Digital Twin intégrant un automate Siemens S7-1500, 
      un variateur de fréquence VFD, une supervision Grafana en temps réel 
      et une représentation 3D interactive sous Unity 6.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-authors">
      <div class="author-chip"><span class="dot"></span>Salaheddine Ibnahmed</div>
      <div class="author-chip"><span class="dot"></span>Oussama Manouz</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tech-badges">
      <span class="badge b1">Siemens S7-1500</span>
      <span class="badge b2">TIA Portal V20</span>
      <span class="badge b3">Node-RED · MQTT</span>
      <span class="badge b4">Unity 6</span>
      <span class="badge b2">Grafana</span>
      <span class="badge b1">Modbus RTU</span>
      <span class="badge">S7-PLCSIM</span>
      <span class="badge b3">Ladder LAD</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="div">

<!-- CONTEXTE -->
<section id="contexte">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow"><span class="section-num">01 — CONTEXTE</span><div class="section-num-line"></div></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Projet Industrie 4.0</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">
      Ce projet s'inscrit dans l'Industrie 4.0 et développe un jumeau numérique (Digital Twin) permettant la commande, 
      la supervision et la visualisation en temps réel d'un moteur asynchrone piloté par un automate Siemens S7-1500 
      simulé via S7-PLCSIM, programmé sous TIA Portal V20.
    </p>

    <div class="metrics-row">
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-val">3</div><div class="metric-label">Vitesses contrôlées</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-val" style="color:var(--accent3)">RT</div><div class="metric-label">Supervision temps réel</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-val" style="color:var(--accent2)">MQTT</div><div class="metric-label">Protocole IoT</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-val" style="color:var(--accent4)">3D</div><div class="metric-label">Jumeau Unity 6</div></div>
      <div class="metric"><div class="metric-val">RS485</div><div class="metric-label">Bus Modbus RTU</div></div>
    </div>


<!-- ARCHITECTURE -->
<section id="architecture" class="alt-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow"><span class="section-num">02 — ARCHITECTURE</span><div class="section-num-line"></div></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Architecture du système</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">
      L'ensemble repose sur plusieurs couches technologiques interconnectées : commande automate, 
      communication industrielle, supervision IoT et représentation virtuelle 3D.
    </p>

    <!-- Schéma architecture SVG -->
    <div class="arch-card" style="margin-bottom:2rem">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--accent);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:1.25rem;text-transform:uppercase">Schéma d'architecture — Flux de données</div>
      <div class="arch-svg-wrap">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 820 480" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'JetBrains Mono',monospace">
          <defs>
            <marker id="arr" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto">
              <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#00c8ff"/>
            </marker>
            <marker id="arr2" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto">
              <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#39e07a"/>
            </marker>
            <marker id="arr3" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto">
              <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#c77dff"/>
            </marker>
            <filter id="glow"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
          </defs>

          <!-- Fond couches -->
          <rect x="10" y="10" width="800" height="100" rx="8" fill="rgba(0,200,255,.04)" stroke="rgba(0,200,255,.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="20" y="30" font-size="9" fill="rgba(0,200,255,.5)" letter-spacing="2">COUCHE COMMANDE</text>

          <rect x="10" y="130" width="800" height="100" rx="8" fill="rgba(57,224,122,.04)" stroke="rgba(57,224,122,.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="20" y="150" font-size="9" fill="rgba(57,224,122,.5)" letter-spacing="2">COUCHE COMMUNICATION</text>

          <rect x="10" y="250" width="800" height="100" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.04)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="20" y="270" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.5)" letter-spacing="2">COUCHE SUPERVISION</text>

          <rect x="10" y="370" width="800" height="100" rx="8" fill="rgba(199,125,255,.04)" stroke="rgba(199,125,255,.15)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="20" y="390" font-size="9" fill="rgba(199,125,255,.5)" letter-spacing="2">COUCHE JUMEAU NUMÉRIQUE</text>

          <!-- COUCHE 1 : Commande -->
          <!-- S7-PLCSIM -->
          <rect x="60" y="38" width="140" height="60" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#glow)"/>
          <text x="130" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#00c8ff">S7-PLCSIM</text>
          <text x="130" y="76" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Simulation PLC</text>
          <text x="130" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">TIA Portal V20</text>

          <!-- CPU 1516 -->
          <rect x="270" y="38" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#glow)"/>
          <text x="350" y="58" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#00c8ff">CPU 1516-3 PN/DP</text>
          <text x="350" y="73" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#dde6f0">DB_SUPERVISION</text>
          <text x="350" y="87" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Vitesse · Tension · Courant</text>

          <!-- VFD -->
          <rect x="520" y="38" width="140" height="60" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="rgba(0,200,255,.5)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="590" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#dde6f0">VFD</text>
          <text x="590" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Variateur de fréquence</text>
          <text x="590" y="89" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Esclave Modbus · addr 0</text>

          <!-- Moteur -->
          <rect x="700" y="38" width="100" height="60" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="rgba(0,200,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="750" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#dde6f0">Moteur</text>
          <text x="750" y="77" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Asynchrone</text>
          <text x="750" y="91" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Triphasé</text>

          <!-- Flèches couche 1 -->
          <line x1="200" y1="68" x2="268" y2="68" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
          <text x="234" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">S7</text>
          <line x1="430" y1="68" x2="518" y2="68" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
          <text x="474" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">Modbus RTU</text>
          <line x1="660" y1="68" x2="698" y2="68" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>

          <!-- COUCHE 2 : Communication -->
          <!-- Node-RED -->
          <rect x="200" y="158" width="140" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#39e07a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="270" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#39e07a">Node-RED</text>
          <text x="270" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Protocole S7</text>
          <text x="270" y="207" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Lit variables PLC</text>

          <!-- MQTT Mosquitto -->
          <rect x="420" y="158" width="150" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#39e07a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="495" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#39e07a">MQTT Mosquitto</text>
          <text x="495" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Broker IoT</text>
          <text x="495" y="207" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Redistribue les données</text>

          <!-- Flèches couche 2 -->
          <line x1="350" y1="98" x2="280" y2="157" stroke="#39e07a" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr2)" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>
          <line x1="340" y1="185" x2="418" y2="185" stroke="#39e07a" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr2)"/>
          <text x="379" y="179" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#39e07a">publish</text>

          <!-- COUCHE 3 : Supervision -->
          <!-- Grafana -->
          <rect x="130" y="278" width="140" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="200" y="298" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#ff6b35">Grafana</text>
          <text x="200" y="313" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Dashboard temps réel</text>
          <text x="200" y="327" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Vitesse · Tension · Courant</text>

          <!-- Panneau commande -->
          <rect x="380" y="278" width="150" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.5)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="455" y="298" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#dde6f0">Panneau Web</text>
          <text x="455" y="313" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">Commande Start/Stop</text>
          <text x="455" y="327" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">V1 · V2 · V3 · Urgence</text>

          <!-- Flèches couche 3 -->
          <line x1="495" y1="213" x2="210" y2="277" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>
          <line x1="495" y1="213" x2="455" y2="277" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>

          <!-- Flèche retour commande →  PLC -->
          <line x1="455" y1="278" x2="420" y2="215" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
          <text x="445" y="248" font-size="7" fill="#ff6b35">cmds</text>

          <!-- COUCHE 4 : Jumeau -->
          <!-- Unity -->
          <rect x="120" y="398" width="180" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#c77dff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <text x="210" y="418" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#c77dff">Unity 6 — Scène 3D</text>
          <text x="210" y="433" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">PLC · VFD · Moteur · Boutons</text>
          <text x="210" y="447" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">M2MqttUnity (C#)</text>

          <!-- Scripts C# -->
          <rect x="380" y="398" width="160" height="55" rx="6" fill="#0e1520" stroke="rgba(199,125,255,.5)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <text x="460" y="418" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#dde6f0">Sync Temps Réel</text>
          <text x="460" y="433" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#6b7f96">MQTT ↔ Unity</text>
          <text x="460" y="447" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">États · Animations · Voyants</text>

          <!-- Flèches couche 4 -->
          <line x1="495" y1="333" x2="460" y2="397" stroke="#c77dff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr3)" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>
          <line x1="380" y1="425" x2="300" y2="425" stroke="#c77dff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr3)"/>

          <!-- Légende -->
          <g transform="translate(600,390)">
            <text font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96" letter-spacing="1" y="0">LÉGENDE</text>
            <line x1="0" y1="12" x2="28" y2="12" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
            <text x="32" y="16" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Données</text>
            <line x1="0" y1="28" x2="28" y2="28" stroke="#39e07a" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,2" marker-end="url(#arr2)"/>
            <text x="32" y="32" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">MQTT pub</text>

        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Schéma Modbus détaillé -->
    <div class="flow-schema">
      <div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:.72rem;color:var(--accent2);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:1.25rem;text-transform:uppercase">Schéma Communication Modbus RTU — Registres & Données</div>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 820 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'JetBrains Mono',monospace">
        <defs>
          <marker id="arM" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#ff6b35"/></marker>
          <marker id="arM2" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#00c8ff"/></marker>
        </defs>

        <!-- CPU block -->
        <rect x="20" y="60" width="220" height="160" rx="8" fill="#0e1520" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="20" y="60" width="220" height="30" rx="8" fill="rgba(0,200,255,.1)"/>
        <text x="130" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#00c8ff">CPU 1516-3 PN/DP</text>
        <text x="130" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Programme OB1 (Main)</text>

        <!-- DB1 -->
        <rect x="35" y="105" width="90" height="100" rx="4" fill="#060a0f" stroke="rgba(0,200,255,.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="80" y="122" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#00c8ff">DB1</text>
        <text x="80" y="136" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">DB_SUPERVISION</text>
        <text x="80" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#39e07a">Vitesse DBW0</text>
        <text x="80" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#39e07a">Tension DBW2</text>
        <text x="80" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#39e07a">Courant DBW14</text>
        <text x="80" y="191" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#c77dff">VFD[0..4]</text>

        <!-- DB2 -->
        <rect x="145" y="105" width="85" height="100" rx="4" fill="#060a0f" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="187" y="122" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#ff6b35">DB2</text>
        <text x="187" y="136" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">MB_MASTER</text>
        <text x="187" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">REQ: false</text>
        <text x="187" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">ADDR: 0</text>
        <text x="187" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">REG: 44098</text>
        <text x="187" y="191" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">LEN: 5</text>

        <!-- Comm_Load -->
        <rect x="20" y="230" width="100" height="35" rx="4" fill="#060a0f" stroke="rgba(199,125,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="70" y="246" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#c77dff">DB3 Comm_Load</text>
        <text x="70" y="259" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#6b7f96">9600 baud · FirstScan</text>

        <!-- RS485 bus -->
        <rect x="320" y="100" width="180" height="80" rx="6" fill="#060a0f" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="410" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#ff6b35">RS-485 Bus</text>
        <text x="410" y="142" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#dde6f0">Modbus RTU</text>
        <text x="410" y="158" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">9600 baud · parity 0</text>
        <text x="410" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">resp. timeout 1000 ms</text>

        <!-- VFD -->
        <rect x="590" y="60" width="210" height="160" rx="8" fill="#0e1520" stroke="rgba(57,224,122,.6)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="590" y="60" width="210" height="30" rx="8" fill="rgba(57,224,122,.08)"/>
        <text x="695" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#39e07a">VFD — Esclave</text>
        <text x="695" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Adresse Modbus: 0</text>
        <text x="695" y="113" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">Registre 44098 (base)</text>
        <rect x="605" y="120" width="180" height="90" rx="4" fill="#060a0f" stroke="rgba(57,224,122,.2)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="695" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#39e07a">Registres renvoyés (5 mots)</text>
        <text x="695" y="153" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#dde6f0">[0] → Vitesse (rpm)</text>
        <text x="695" y="167" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#dde6f0">[1] → —</text>
        <text x="695" y="181" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#dde6f0">[3] → Tension (V)</text>
        <text x="695" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#dde6f0">[4] → Courant (A)</text>

        <!-- Flèches -->
        <line x1="240" y1="140" x2="318" y2="140" stroke="#ff6b35" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arM)"/>
        <text x="279" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#ff6b35">REQ lecture</text>
        <line x1="500" y1="140" x2="588" y2="140" stroke="#00c8ff" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arM2)"/>
        <text x="544" y="133" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#00c8ff">DATA 5 mots</text>

        <!-- MOVE arrows inside CPU -->
        <text x="410" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6b7f96">MOVE Network 4,5,6 :</text>
        <text x="410" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#39e07a">VFD[0]→Vitesse · VFD[3]→Tension · VFD[4]→Courant</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

    <div class="specs-grid">
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">🖥️</div>
        <div class="spec-title">1 · Programmation Automate</div>
        <div class="spec-val">TIA Portal V20 — Ladder LAD</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Développement du programme OB1 (Main) avec 6 réseaux : commande 3 vitesses, arrêt d'urgence, communication Modbus maître et transfert des données supervision.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">🔬</div>
        <div class="spec-title">2 · Simulation S7-PLCSIM</div>
        <div class="spec-val">Validation sans matériel physique</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Validation complète du programme Ladder via S7-PLCSIM. Test de toutes les séquences de commande avant déploiement sur automate physique.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">🔗</div>
        <div class="spec-title">3 · Communication Node-RED</div>
        <div class="spec-val">S7 Protocol → MQTT Mosquitto</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Configuration de Node-RED pour lire les variables du PLC (Vitesse, Tension, Courant, états) et les publier sur le broker MQTT Mosquitto en temps réel.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">📊</div>
        <div class="spec-title">4 · Supervision Grafana</div>
        <div class="spec-val">Dashboard industriel temps réel</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Création d'un tableau de bord visualisant vitesse (rpm), tension (V) et courant (A). Jauges, courbes historiques et indicateurs d'état machine.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">🎮</div>
        <div class="spec-title">5 · Jumeau Numérique Unity 6</div>
        <div class="spec-val">Scène 3D interactive</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Modélisation 3D du PLC Siemens, du variateur de vitesse, du moteur, des boutons de commande et des voyants lumineux. Synchronisation via M2MqttUnity (C#).</div>
      </div>
      <div class="spec-card">
        <div class="spec-icon">⚡</div>
        <div class="spec-title">6 · Intégration MQTT ↔ Unity</div>
        <div class="spec-val">Communication bidirectionnelle</div>
        <div class="spec-desc">Les boutons Unity envoient les commandes via MQTT → Node-RED → PLC. Les états du PLC sont publiés et reçus par Unity pour animer la scène 3D en temps réel.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="div">

<!-- PROGRAMME -->
<section id="programme" class="alt-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow"><span class="section-num">04 — PROGRAMME LADDER</span><div class="section-num-line"></div></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Captures TIA Portal & Code LAD</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Vues du programme OB1 (Main) — 6 réseaux dans Totally Integrated Automation Portal.</p>

    <div class="gallery-section-title">Programme LAD — Réseaux 1 à 3</div>
    <div class="gallery-single">
      <div class="img-card">
        <img style="width:100%;height:500px;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Réseaux 1-3 TIA Portal" loading="lazy">
        <div class="img-caption">
          <div class="img-caption-title">Réseaux 1–3 : Commande vitesses, Modbus_Master, Modbus_Comm_Load</div>
          <div class="img-caption-desc">Réseau 1 : logique Ladder d'exclusion mutuelle des 3 vitesses avec arrêt d'urgence. Réseau 2 : bloc MB_MASTER pour lecture des registres VFD. Réseau 3 : initialisation Modbus au premier scan.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gallery-section-title">Programme LAD — Réseaux 4 à 6</div>
    <div class="gallery-single">
      <div class="img-card">
        <img style="width:100%;height:380px;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Réseaux 4-6 TIA Portal" loading="lazy">
        <div class="img-caption">
          <div class="img-caption-title">Réseaux 4–6 : Blocs MOVE — Transfert données VFD → DB_SUPERVISION</div>
          <div class="img-caption-desc">Réseau 4 : VFD[0] → Vitesse (DBW4→DBW0). Réseau 5 : VFD[3] → Tension (DBW10→DBW2). Réseau 6 : VFD[4] → Courant (DBW12→DBW14).</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


<!-- RESULTATS -->
<section id="resultats">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow"><span class="section-num">05 — RÉSULTATS</span><div class="section-num-line"></div></div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Démonstrations & Captures</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">Résultats visuels du système en fonctionnement : dashboard Grafana, flux Node-RED et jumeau numérique Unity.</p>

    <div class="gallery-section-title">Dashboard Grafana — Supervision temps réel</div>
    <div class="gallery-single">
      <div class="img-card">
        <img style="width:100%;height:380px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;display:block;background:#000" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dashboard Grafana" loading="lazy">
        <div class="img-caption">
          <div class="img-caption-title">📊 Dashboard Grafana — Vitesse 1500 rpm · Tension 380 V · Courant 20 A</div>
          <div class="img-caption-desc">Tableau de bord industriel affichant en temps réel : courbe historique de vitesse, jauge RPM avec indicateur VITESSE 3, tension et courant du moteur lus via Modbus RTU depuis le variateur de fréquence.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gallery-section-title">Flux Node-RED — Intégration MQTT</div>
    <div class="gallery-single">
      <div class="img-card">
        <img style="width:100%;height:400px;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Flux Node-RED" loading="lazy">
        <div class="img-caption">
          <div class="img-caption-title">🔌 Flux Node-RED — Communication bidirectionnelle S7 ↔ MQTT</div>
          <div class="img-caption-desc">Flows complets : lecture des variables PLC (Vitesse1/2/3, Arret, Emergency, Tension, Courant) via protocole S7 et publication sur les topics MQTT correspondants. Gestion de l'état machine et synchronisation avec Unity.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gallery-section-title">Jumeau Numérique Unity 6 — Scène 3D</div>
    <div class="gallery-single">
      <div class="img-card">
        <img style="width:100%;height:400px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;display:block" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Jumeau numérique Unity" loading="lazy">
        <div class="img-caption">
          <div class="img-caption-title">🎮 Représentation 3D — Jumeau numérique interactif</div>

<script>
// Scroll reveal
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.style.opacity='1';
      e.target.style.transform='translateY(0)';
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.08});

document.querySelectorAll('.spec-card,.img-card,.metric,.arch-card,.flow-schema,.code-block').forEach(el=>{
  el.style.opacity='0';
  el.style.transform='translateY(28px)';
  el.style.transition='opacity .55s ease,transform .55s ease';
  obs.observe(el);
});
</script>
